items.title_en: Google Broke Its Promise to Me. Now ICE Has My Data
items.title_zh: 谷歌违背承诺，现在 ICE 已掌握我的数据
items.summary_en: Google's data sharing with ICE, despite promises, highlights how government access can negate user privacy. The case underscores the tension between platform commitments and law enforcement data demands, and the need for stronger privacy controls.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌在承诺后将部分用户数据提供给 ICE，暴露了政府访问如何侵蚀用户隐私的风险。此事凸显平台承诺与执法需求之间的矛盾，强调需要更强的隐私控制与透明度。

items.title_en: AI-Assisted Cognition Endangers Human Development
items.title_zh: AI 辅助认知威胁人类发展
items.summary_en: AI-assisted cognition may accelerate learning, but overreliance risks eroding critical thinking and autonomy. The piece argues for safeguards and governance to ensure AI augments rather than dominates human development.
items.summary_zh: AI 辅助认知可能加速学习，但过度依赖会侵蚀批判性思维与自主性。文章呼吁建立安全防护和治理机制，确保 AI 只是增效而非主导人类发展。

items.title_en: Open Source Isn't Dead. Cal.com Just Learned the Wrong Lesson
items.title_zh: 开源并未死去，Cal.com 学到了错误的一课
items.summary_en: Open source isn't dead, but Cal.com demonstrates a flawed response to AI disruption. Rather than retreating, sustaining open ecosystems requires thoughtful governance and continued collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 开源并未死去，但 Cal.com 的做法暴露了对 AI 变革的错误应对。与其退缩，不断开放与社区治理的平衡才是维系开源生态的关键。

items.title_en: God Sleeps in the Minerals
items.title_zh: 神眠于矿物之中
items.summary_en: Minerals carry Earth's history and future potential for technology and energy, and the piece reflects on their quiet power shaping civilization.
items.summary_zh: 矿物承载着地球的历史与未来技术、能源潜力，文章反思它们在安静中塑造文明的力量。

items.title_en: Elevated errors on Claude.ai, API, Claude Code
items.title_zh: Claude.ai、API、Claude Code 的错误率上升
items.summary_en: Elevated errors on Claude.ai, its API, and Claude Code point to reliability issues affecting user experience and enterprise adoption.
items.summary_zh: Claude.ai、API 与 Claude Code 的错误率上升，指向影响用户体验与企业采用的可靠性问题。

items.title_en: Where did my taxes go?
items.title_zh: 我的税钱去了哪里？
items.summary_en: Where did my taxes go? tracks government spending and public expenditures, illustrating transparency gaps and public demand for clearer budgets.
items.summary_zh: 追踪税款去向，揭示政府支出透明度的不足与公众对更清晰预算的需求。

items.title_en: Kalshi CEO expects US DOJ to prosecute insider trading cases
items.title_zh: Kalshi 的 CEO 预计 DOJ 将起诉内幕交易案件
items.summary_en: Kalshi's CEO predicts DOJ prosecutions for insider trading, signaling tougher enforcement for markets and prediction platforms alike. If borne out, it could raise compliance bars and reshape how operators govern access and information.
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 的 CEO 预测 DOJ 将起诉内幕交易案件，标志着对市场及预测平台的执法将趋严。若成真，可能提高合规门槛并影响运营方对信息披露与治理的要求。

items.title_en: CPUs Aren't Dead. Gemma2B Out Scored GPT-3.5 Turbo on Test That Made It Famous
items.title_zh: CPU 并未死，Gemma2B 在著名测试中击败 GPT-3.5 Turbo
items.summary_en: Gemma2B reportedly outscored GPT-3.5 Turbo on a benchmark that made the latter famous, reminding us that CPUs and optimized systems still matter for certain AI tasks.
items.summary_zh: 据称 Gemma2B 在一项让 GPT-3.5 Turbo 成名的基准测试中获胜，提醒我们在某些 AI 场景下，CPU 和优化系统仍然重要。

items.title_en: The Future of Everything Is Lies, I Guess: New Jobs
items.title_zh: 未来的一切都是谎言？新职业机会
items.summary_en: A candid take on how the AI-era job landscape will be built on new roles that barely existed before, and how truth biases shape our expectations. It points to growth areas like AI workflow engineering, data curation, and governance as likely sites of opportunity. The takeaway is practical upskilling and adaptability are essential to ride the wave of change.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章直指AI时代的就业格局将由前所未有的新岗位支撑，并揭示人们对未来的期望往往被偏见所左右。文章指出AI工作流工程、数据治理与治理等领域可能成为机会重点，同时强调需要通过实际技能提升与适应能力来应对变化浪潮。

items.title_en: Want to Write a Compiler? Just Read These Two Papers (2008)
items.title_zh: 想写编译器吗？只要读这两篇论文（2008）
items.summary_en: Reading them provides a practical, compact blueprint for building a compiler and avoiding common pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 文章推荐两篇2008年的关键论文，浓缩了编译器实现的核心要点，读者可以获得写编译器的实用路线图与要点。

items.title_en: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6
items.title_zh: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6
items.summary_en: DeepMind's Gemini Robotics ER 1.6 introduces improved autonomous capabilities, safety features, and hardware-software integration for real-world robots. The release emphasizes more reliable perception, planning, and control in dynamic environments. The development signals progress toward practical, AI-powered robotics at scale.
items.summary_zh: DeepMind 的 Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 提升了自主能力与安全特性，并改善了与硬件的软硬件整合，适用于真实场景的机器人。新版本在动态环境中强化感知、规划与控制的可靠性，标志着大规模落地的AI驱动机器人技术取得进展。

items.title_en: Keep Android Open
items.title_zh: 让 Android 保持开放
items.summary_en: A campaign promoting open-source Android; calls for openness, user freedoms. The effort touches on open-source contributions, vendor lock-in risks, and ecosystem health. It highlights a community-driven stance on preserving freedom and innovation in mobile software.
items.summary_zh: 一场推动开放 Android 的运动，倡导开放、用户自由。该倡议涉及开源贡献、厂商锁定风险与生态系统健康等话题，强调社区驱动的立场以维护移动软件的自由与创新。

items.title_en: Good Sleep, Good Learning (2012)
items.title_zh: 良好睡眠，良好学习（2012）
items.summary_en: A 2012 piece synthesizes evidence that adequate sleep improves memory consolidation and learning performance, with practical tips for students and knowledge workers.
items.summary_zh: 该文汇总了研究证据，指出充足睡眠能促进记忆巩固和学习效果，并给出实用的睡眠优化建议，适用于学生与知识工作者。

items.title_en: Show HN: Every CEO and CFO change at US public companies, live from SEC
items.title_zh: Show HN：美股上市公司CEO与CFO变动实时来自SEC
items.summary_en: A live-feed project tracks CEO and CFO changes in US public companies as filings hit the SEC, offering a near real-time pulse of leadership moves. Such data can help investors gauge governance dynamics and potential strategic shifts sooner. It underscores the value of real-time, publicly available corporate data for markets.
items.summary_zh: 一个实时跟踪美股上市公司CEO与CFO变动的项目，直接从SEC申报数据获取信息，近实时反映领导层动态。此类数据有助于投资者早些洞察治理结构与潜在策略调整，凸显公开市场数据在投资决策中的价值。

items.title_en: Stop Flock
items.title_zh: 停止 Flock
items.summary_en: A manifesto-ish post about stopping Stop Flock, presumably arguing to abandon that tech, and to switch to alternatives due to concerns around maintenance, security, or direction. It highlights why preserving openness matters for developers.
items.summary_zh: 呼吁放弃 Stop Flock 的相关工具/平台，理由可能涉及维护、隐私与安全等问题，并提出转向替代方案的理由。强调对开放性和开发者生态的关注。

items.title_en: AI ruling prompts warnings from US lawyers: Your chats could be used against you
items.title_zh: AI 判决引发美国律师警示：你的聊天记录可能被用于起诉
items.summary_en: The ruling prompts lawyers to caution clients about what they share with AI tools, as chats could be discoverable. Law firms are pushing for data hygiene practices and privacy-aware workflows when using AI. The article underscores AI's impact on legal strategy and client counsel.
items.summary_zh: 判决促使律师提醒客户在使用人工智能工具时谨慎分享信息，因为聊天记录可能成为证据。律师事务所正在推动数据清理与隐私友好工作流程，确保在使用 AI 时的合规性。此事凸显AI对法律策略和客户咨询的影响。

items.title_en: The tiniest e-reader in the world, and you can build one yourself
items.title_zh: 世界上最小的电子书阅读器，你也可以自己动手打造
items.summary_en: The tiniest e-reader you can build yourself, showing a compact DIY project for a palm-sized e-ink reader.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个极小型的可自制电子书阅读器项目，演示如何用紧凑硬件打造掌心大小的电子墨水屏阅读设备。

items.title_en: Cal.com is going closed source
items.title_zh: Cal.com 将走向闭源
items.summary_en: Cal.com pivots to closed source, signaling a shift away from community-driven development. The move highlights tensions between openness and monetization in open-source projects and could affect contributors and users.
items.summary_zh: Cal.com 转向闭源，显示出远离社区驱动开发的趋势。此举凸显开源项目在开放性与商业化之间的矛盾，可能影响贡献者与用户的长期利益。

items.title_en: Do you even need a database?
items.title_zh: 你真的需要数据库吗？
items.summary_en: Do you really need a database? The piece challenges default database assumptions, exploring alternatives like event sourcing, in-memory stores, or serverless options for certain workloads.
items.summary_zh: 真的需要数据库吗？文章质疑默认使用数据库的假设，探讨事件源、内存存储或无服务等在特定工作负载中的替代方案。

items.title_en: Show HN: Libretto – Making AI browser automations deterministic
items.title_zh: Show HN: Libretto – 让 AI 浏览器自动化变得确定性
items.summary_en: Libretto makes AI-driven browser automation deterministic, improving reliability and debuggability for automation tasks. It helps reproduce results across runs, reducing flaky behaviors.
items.summary_zh: Libretto 让 AI 驱动的浏览器自动化变得确定、可重复，提升自动化任务的可靠性与可调试性。它有助于在多次运行中重现结果，减少不稳定现象。

items.title_en: Anna's Archive loses $322M Spotify piracy case without a fight
items.title_zh: Anna's Archive 在 3.22 亿美元 Spotify 盗版案中败诉，未进行抗辩
items.summary_en: Anna's Archive loses a $322 million piracy case against Spotify without contest, underscoring the risk of distributing infringing content at scale. The outcome highlights platform responsibility and raises questions about how easy it is to host infringing content online.
items.summary_zh: Anna's Archive 在对 Spotify 的 3.22 亿美元盗版案中未进行抗辩就败诉，凸显大规模传播侵权内容的风险。判决强调平台责任以及托管盗版内容的挑战。

items.title_en: Your Backpack Got Worse on Purpose
items.title_zh: 你的背包为何被故意设计得更糟
items.summary_en: The post argues that some products degrade user experience on purpose to extract value. It critiques monetization strategies that add friction or reduce durability. A call to design ethics and user-centric product thinking.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为某些产品故意让用户体验变差以获取更高价值，并批评那些以增加摩擦、降低耐用性为代价的变现策略。呼吁以设计伦理和以用户为中心的产品思维来解决此问题。

items.title_en: Wacli – WhatsApp CLI
items.title_zh: Wacli — WhatsApp 命令行工具：同步、搜索、发送
items.summary_en: Wacli is a command-line tool for WhatsApp that can sync messages, search history, and send messages from the terminal. It enables automation and scripting around messaging workflows.
items.summary_zh: Wacli 是一个 WhatsApp 命令行工具，支持同步、搜索和发送消息，便于在脚本与自动化工作流中使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: US national level OS-level age verification bill
items.title_zh: 美国全国层面的操作系统级别年龄验证法案
items.summary_en: A proposed US bill would enforce age verification at the OS level, raising privacy and entitlement concerns. Advocates cite safety and compliance, while critics worry about encryption, accessibility, and overreach. The policy debate highlights tensions between security, user rights, and platform governance.
items.summary_zh: 一项拟议中的美国法案将强制在操作系统层面进行年龄验证，引发隐私与权限争议。支持者称这是出于安全与合规的考虑，批评者担心对加密、无障碍性与过度监管的影响。这场政策辩论凸显了安全、用户权利与平台治理之间的紧张关系。

items.title_en: Claude Code Routines
items.title_zh: Claude 的代码例程
items.summary_en: Claude has published a collection of code routines—modular templates and functions—for building AI-assisted software. These routines aim to accelerate common programming tasks and demonstrate practical patterns for applying language models in real-world coding workflows.
items.summary_zh: Claude 发布了一系列代码例程——模块化模板与函数，用于构建 AI 助力的软件。这些例程旨在加速常见编程任务，展示将大语言模型应用于实际编码工作流的实用模式。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Fiverr left customer files public and searchable
items.title_zh: Tell HN：Fiverr 将客户文件公开且可检索
items.summary_en: A reported misconfiguration left customer project files publicly accessible and searchable, exposing potentially sensitive data and trade secrets. The incident underscores the risk of data leakage in freelancing marketplaces and the importance of rapid remediation and audit.
items.summary_zh: 有报道称 Fiverr 的配置错误使客户文件公开且可被检索，暴露潜在的敏感数据与商业机密。事件凸显自由职业市场的数据泄露风险，以及需要快速修复与审计的必要性。

items.title_en: Google Gemma 4 Runs Natively on iPhone with Full Offline AI Inference
items.title_zh: Google Gemma 4 在 iPhone 上原生运行，实现完整离线 AI 推理
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 runs natively on iPhone, delivering full offline AI inference. This on-device capability reduces latency and preserves privacy by avoiding cloud round-trips. It signals a broader shift toward on-device AI in consumer devices and the tooling that supports it.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 能在 iPhone 上原生运行，实现完整的离线 AI 推理。这种设备端能力通过避免云端回传降低延迟并提升隐私保护，标志着消费级设备向本地 AI 迁移的发展趋势，以及相关开发工具链的进步。

items.title_en: Direct Win32 API, Weird-Shaped Windows, and Why They Mostly Disappeared
items.title_zh: 直接 Win32 API、奇形窗口，以及它们为何大多已消失
items.summary_en: The article traces why direct Win32 API calls and irregular window shapes faded as Windows evolved toward safer, standardized UI. It explains security and compatibility drivers behind the shift away from quirky UI tricks. A historical look at Windows UX design decisions that influence modern OS architecture.
items.summary_zh: 文章追溯了随着 Windows 向更安全、标准化的 UI 演进，直接使用 Win32 API 和奇形窗口为何逐渐消失。解释了促成这一转变的安全性与兼容性驱动因素，并提供对现代操作系统架构有影响的历史性分析。

items.title_en: Fixing a 20-year-old bug in Enlightenment E16
items.title_zh: 修复 Enlightenment E16 的一个 20 年前的 bug
items.summary_en: A long-standing bug in the Enlightenment E16 window manager is fixed, illustrating the ongoing work of maintaining aging open-source software. The post walks through the debugging journey and the payoff of stabilizing a legacy desktop environment.
items.summary_zh: 对 Enlightenment E16 的一个长期遗留 bug 已修复，体现了维护老旧开源软件的挑战。文中讲述调试过程与问题根源，展示对遗留桌面环境的稳定性提升。

items.title_en: I wrote to Flock's privacy contact to opt out of their domestic spying program
items.title_zh: 我给 Flock 的隐私联系邮箱写信，请求退出他们的国内监控计划
items.summary_en: An opt-out request to Flock's privacy contact highlights ongoing concerns about how browsers collect data and potential domestic data-sharing arrangements. The issue underscores the need for transparent privacy controls and auditable telemetry for users who want to protect their data.
items.summary_zh: 向 Flock 的隐私联系渠道提出退出请求，凸显关于浏览器数据收集与潜在国内数据共享的持续担忧。此事强调需要透明的隐私控制与可审计的遥测数据，帮助用户保护自己的信息。

items.title_en: Rare concert recordings are landing on the Internet Archive
items.title_zh: 罕见演唱会录音正登陆互联网档案馆
items.summary_en: Thousands of rare concert recordings are landing on the Internet Archive, expanding its treasure trove of live performances. The influx broadens access for fans and researchers, but raises questions about rights, licensing, and long-term preservation.
items.summary_zh: 数千份罕见的演唱会录音正加入互联网档案馆，丰富了其现场演出藏品。增加的内容让粉丝和研究者获取更加广泛，但也引发关于版权、许可与长期保存的讨论。

items.title_en: DaVinci Resolve – Photo
items.title_zh: DaVinci Resolve：照片功能
items.summary_en: Blackmagic Design expands DaVinci Resolve with a photo-focused workflow, integrating still-image editing and color tooling into the suite. The update positions Resolve as a unified platform for creators who blend photography and video, potentially reducing tool fragmentation.
items.summary_zh: Blackmagic Design 将 DaVinci Resolve 引入面向照片的工作流，将静态图像编辑和色彩分级工具整合到套件中。此更新使 Resolve 成为摄影与视频制作的统一平台，或将减少跨工具的需求。

items.title_en: Allbirds shares soar 600% as it pivots from footwear to AI
items.title_zh: Allbirds 股价暴涨 600%，从鞋履转型至 AI
items.summary_en: Allbirds soars after pivoting from footwear to AI, reflecting investors' appetite for AI-enabled consumer brands and the risks of pivoting away from core products.
items.summary_zh: Allbirds 在从鞋履转型至 AI 的举动后股价飙升，折射出对 AI 驱动消费品牌的投资情绪，同时也提醒转型风险。

items.title_en: Users lose $9.5M to fake Ledger wallet app on the Apple App Store
items.title_zh: 用户在 Apple App Store 上因假 Ledger 钱包应用损失 950 万美元
items.summary_en: Fake Ledger wallet app on the Apple App Store led to $9.5M in losses for users, highlighting app-store verification gaps and the risk of counterfeit crypto apps.
items.summary_zh: 苹果应用商店的假 Ledger 钱包应用让用户损失 950 万美元，暴露应用商店审核漏洞及伪造加密钱包应用的风险。

items.title_en: A new spam policy for “back button hijacking”
items.title_zh: 防止后退按钮劫持的新策略
items.summary_en: Google updates its spam policy to crack down on back button hijacking, labeling manipulative UX that traps users as spam. The policy provides examples and enforcement expectations, encouraging developers to avoid overlays and deceptive navigation.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌更新了反垃圾邮件政策，打击利用后退按钮劫持的页面，视此类操纵性 UX 为垃圾信息。政策给出示例和执行预期，鼓励开发者避免覆盖层、强制导航等误导性设计。

items.title_en: New bill would let New Yorkers hang solar panels from windows
items.title_zh: 新法案将允许纽约人在窗户上挂太阳能板
items.summary_en: A bill would let New Yorkers mount solar panels on building windows, expanding urban solar adoption with potential aesthetic and safety considerations. If enacted, it could unlock solar access in dense areas and influence building codes. The move signals regulatory openness to micro-generation in cities.
items.summary_zh: 一项法案将允许纽约人在建筑窗户上安装太阳能板，以扩大城市太阳能应用，同时需考虑美观与安全等因素。如获通过，可能在高密度地区提升光伏接入并影响建筑规范，体现了对城市微型发电的监管开放态度。

items.title_en: Sam Vimes 'Boots' Theory of Socio-Economic Unfairness
items.title_zh: 山姆·维姆斯的“靴子理论”揭示社会经济不公
items.summary_en: The Boots Theory uses a practical poverty example to explain how durable goods costs drive longer-term economic disadvantage. It reframes socio-economic unfairness as a function of resource access and investment willingness. The concept has been cited in tech policy discussions about digital divide and access to capital.
items.summary_zh: 靴子理论通过一个现实的贫困案例，解释了耐用品成本如何造成长期经济劣势。该理论把社会经济不公重新诠释为资源获取和投资意愿的函数，常被在科技政策讨论中引用，涉及数字鸿沟与资本获取等议题。

items.title_en: Someone bought 30 WordPress plugins and planted a backdoor in all of them
items.title_zh: 有人买下 30 个 WordPress 插件并在全部插件中植入后门
items.summary_en: A security researcher demonstrates the depth of supply-chain risk in plugin ecosystems by buying 30 WordPress plugins and inserting a backdoor into each one. The stunt highlights how third-party extensions can compromise many sites if integrity checks and monitoring are lax.
items.summary_zh: 安全研究者展示了通过购买 30 个 WordPress 插件并在每一个插件中植入后门，能够大范围入侵网站。这暴露了第三方插件的供应链和信任机制漏洞，强调加强插件审计、完整性校验和运行时监控的重要性。

items.title_en: US v. Heppner (S.D.N.Y. 2026) no attorney-client privilege for AI chats [pdf]
items.title_zh: US v. Heppner 案：AI 对话不享律师-客户特权
items.summary_en: A court rules AI-generated attorney-client chats do not enjoy the usual privilege. The decision has implications for discovery, privacy, and how clients and firms document advice. It signals the growing tension between AI tooling and traditional legal practice.
items.summary_zh: 法院裁定由AI生成的律师-客户对话不享受通常的特权保护，这一判决影响证据披露、隐私以及客户与律师记录建议的方式，凸显AI 工具与传统法律实务之间日益紧张的关系。

items.title_en: Space Force looks at moving "significant number" of launches from ULA to SpaceX
items.title_zh: Space Force 正在考虑将大量发射从 ULA 转到 SpaceX
items.summary_en: Space Force weighs shifting a significant share of launches from ULA to SpaceX, signaling growing private-sector role in national security launches.
items.summary_zh: 太空部队正在权衡将大量发射任务从 ULA 转给 SpaceX，显示私营部门在国家安全发射中的作用日益增强。

items.title_en: jj – the CLI for Jujutsu
items.title_zh: jj：Jujutsu 的命令行界面
items.summary_en: jj is a new command-line interface for Jujutsu, aiming to simplify interaction with the Jujutsu framework. It provides a convenient, scriptable way to perform core tasks and experiments, reflecting a broader trend toward CLI-first tooling in niche systems.
items.summary_zh: jj 是一个新的 Jujutsu 命令行界面，旨在简化与 Jujutsu 框架的交互。它提供一个便捷、可脚本化的方式来执行核心任务和实验，体现了在小众系统中向 CLI 优先工具的总体趋势。

items.title_en: Dependency cooldowns turn you into a free-rider
items.title_zh: 依赖冷却期让你沦为免费搭便车者
items.summary_en: Dependency cooldowns can unintentionally encourage teams to become free riders, letting someone else worry about upgrades. That inertia increases risk from outdated or vulnerable libraries and complicates security and compliance. The piece argues for redesigning incentives and tooling to enforce timely upgrades and provide clear dependency lifecycles.
items.summary_zh: 依赖冷却期可能无意中让团队成为搭便车者，把升级和审查依赖的责任推给他人。如此会导致过时或易受攻击的组件长期存在，增加安全与合规风险。文章主张通过改进激励、工具和对依赖生命周期的可见性，推动及时升级和明确责任分工。

items.title_en: GitHub Stacked PRs
items.title_zh: GitHub 堆叠 PR
items.summary_en: Stacked PRs bundle several dependent pull requests into a single review flow, letting teams ship large features incrementally. The gh-stack tool provides commands to create, rebase, and track the stack, helping reviewers stay in sync across related changes.
items.summary_zh: 堆叠 PR 将若干相互依赖的 PR 打包到一个评审流程中，便于分阶段交付大型功能。gh-stack 提供创建、变基和跟踪等命令，使评审人能够在相关改动之间保持同步。

items.title_en: Live Nation Illegally Monopolized Ticketing Market, Jury Finds
items.title_zh: 陪审团认定 Live Nation 垄断票务市场
items.summary_en: Jury finds Live Nation illegally monopolized the ticketing market, signaling potential antitrust pressure on major events platforms.
items.summary_zh: 陪审团裁定 Live Nation 非法垄断票务市场，显示对大型票务平台的反垄断压力在上升。

items.title_en: Saying goodbye to Agile
items.title_zh: 告别敏捷开发（Agile）
items.summary_en: A critique of Agile methodologies, arguing that rigid adherence to Agile can hinder long-term product outcomes and that teams should adopt more adaptive, outcome-focused approaches. It advocates for lightweight processes and eliminating ceremony bloat.
items.summary_zh: 对敏捷方法论的批评认为，僵化的 Agile 实践可能损害长期产品结果，团队应转向更自适应、以结果为导向的方法。呼吁简化过程，减少繁琬的仪式化活动。

items.title_en: My AI-Assisted Workflow
items.title_zh: 我的 AI 辅助工作流
items.summary_en: A personal account of an AI-assisted workflow, detailing tools, patterns, and productivity gains, with caveats about over-dependence on prompts.
items.summary_zh: 分享个人的 AI 辅助工作流经验，介绍工具、工作流设计和生产力提升，同时警惕对提示词过度依赖等风险。

items.title_en: Not all elementary functions can be expressed with exp-minus-log
items.title_zh: 并非所有初等函数都能用 exp–log 表达
items.summary_en: A mathematical note showing limitations of representing elementary functions using the combination of exp and log with minus. It highlights the boundaries of symbolic expressiveness and may discuss constructs like elementary functions vs. special function combinations.
items.summary_zh: 这篇数学笔记展示了用 exp 和 log 的组合并相减来表达初等函数的局限性，揭示了符号表达能力的边界。内容可能涉及哪些函数不能通过这类表达式简化表示，以及对计算工具的启示。

items.title_en: OpenSSL 4.0.0
items.title_zh: OpenSSL 4.0.0 发布
items.summary_en: OpenSSL 4.0.0 release ships with critical security fixes and updated APIs that may require downstream updates. The update reflects OpenSSL's ongoing evolution and the importance of patching cryptography libraries in software ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: OpenSSL 4.0.0 发布，包含关键安全修复和更新的 API，可能需要下游应用相应更新。这一版本体现了 OpenSSL 的持续演进，强调在软件生态中对加密库进行打补丁的重要性。

items.title_en: Study: Back-to-basics approach can match or outperform AI in language analysis
items.title_zh: 回归 basics：基础方法能否在语言分析中赶上或超越 AI
items.summary_en: Manchester study finds that traditional, back-to-basics language analysis methods can match or outperform AI in certain tasks. The result invites a more nuanced view of model-first strategies and energy-efficient linguistics tooling. It suggests that judicious hybrid approaches may offer best of both worlds.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究表明，在某些语言分析任务中，传统的“回到 basics”的方法可以与 AI 在表现上匹敌甚至超过它。结果促使人们以更细致的视角看待以模型为先的策略，并强调能效更高的语言分析工具。研究还暗示，审慎的混合方法或许能兼得两者之优。

items.title_en: MCP as Observability Interface: Connecting AI Agents to Kernel Tracepoints
items.title_zh: 以 MCP 作为可观测性接口：将 AI 代理连接到内核跟踪点
items.summary_en: The post proposes using MCP as an observability interface to let AI agents observe kernel behavior via tracepoints. This enables fine-grained, low-latency introspection for debugging, performance tuning, and security tooling. If adopted, it could shift how runtime monitoring and AI-driven automation interact with OS internals.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出让 MCP 作为可观测性接口，通过内核跟踪点让 AI 代理观察系统行为，以实现对调试、性能优化和安全工具的细粒度、低延迟自省。若被采纳，可能改变运行时监控与 AI 自动化在操作系统内部的交互方式。

items.title_en: Allbirds announces pivot from shoes to AI, stock explodes 175%
items.title_zh: Allbirds 从鞋业转向 AI，股价暴涨 175%
items.summary_en: Allbirds reveals a pivot from footwear to AI-related initiatives, sending shares sharply higher. The move reflects investors' enthusiasm for AI-powered experiences and data-enabled business models. It also raises questions about brand strategy and execution in a still-early AI era.
items.summary_zh: Allbirds 宣布从鞋业转向与人工智能相关的举措，股价应声大幅上涨。这一举动反映了投资者对AI驱动体验和数据驱动商业模式的热情，同时也引发对品牌战略与执行在尚处初期的AI时代的讨论。

items.title_en: Fuck the cloud (2009)
items.title_zh: Fuck the Cloud（2009）
items.summary_en: A 2009 manifesto arguing for local-first computing and skepticism of cloud reliance, advocates offline-capable software. It foreshadows ongoing moves toward edge computing.
items.summary_zh: 一篇 2009 年的宣言，主张对云端的依赖保持怀疑，倡导本地优先的离线可用软件，这与当前向边缘计算和本地化架构的趋势相呼应。

items.title_en: The dangers of California's legislation to censor 3D printing
items.title_zh: 加州旨在审查3D打印的立法风险
items.summary_en: California's proposed legislation would impose broad controls on 3D printing designs, potentially forcing platforms to police printable files. Critics warn the measure risks chilling innovation and free expression while creating compliance burdens across makers and vendors.
items.summary_zh: 加州拟议的立法可能对3D打印设计实施广泛监管，要求平台对可打印的设计进行审查。评论认为此举可能抑制创新与言论自由，同时增加制造商与开发者的合规负担。

items.title_en: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.title_zh: 把你最好的 AI 提示变成 Chrome 的“一键工具"
items.summary_en: Chrome now supports turning popular AI prompts into one-click tools that run inside your browser. The feature, part of Skills in Chrome, lets developers publish prompt-driven automations that users can trigger with a single click, streamlining workflows. It signals a shift toward end-user tooling directly in the browser.
items.summary_zh: Chrome 现支持把热门 AI 提示变成浏览器内的“一键工具”。该功能属于 Chrome 的 Skills，将开发者推出的基于提示的自动化工具以单击触发，简化工作流程，标志着浏览器端直接进入 End-user tooling 的趋势。

items.title_en: 5NF and Database Design
items.title_zh: 第5范式与数据库设计
items.summary_en: An exploration of the fifth normal form (5NF) and its implications for database design. It helps developers decide when such theoretical purity is worth the overhead.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦第五范式（5NF）及其对数据库设计的影响。文章分析在高度互联的模式中使用 5NF 的好处（消除连接异常），以及过度规范化带来的性能与维护成本，帮助开发者判断何时值得追求理论上的“纯净”性。

items.title_en: Introspective Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 自省式扩散语言模型
items.summary_en: Introspective diffusion language models aim to improve generation by having the model inspect and refine its own outputs during the diffusion process. This self-evaluation approach could reduce hallucinations and improve reliability on long or complex tasks. If practical, it could influence future LM design and prompting strategies.
items.summary_zh: 自省式扩散语言模型通过在扩散过程中让模型审视并改进自己的输出，提升生成的准确性与稳定性。该方法有望减少幻觉现象，尤其是在长文本或复杂任务中的表现。若落地，将影响未来的语言模型设计与提示策略。

items.title_en: Apple App Store threatened to remove Grok over deepfakes: Letter
items.title_zh: 苹果 App Store 因深度伪造内容威胁下架 Grok：公开信
items.summary_en: Apple reportedly threatened to pull Grok from the App Store amid concerns about deepfake capabilities and misuse, triggering a debate about platform risk vs. user autonomy and AI-generated media governance. The incident highlights policy risk for AI-enabled apps and the limits of platform discretion.
items.summary_zh: 报道称苹果因担忧深度伪造和滥用风险，威胁下架 Grok 应用，激发关于平台风险、用户自主权以及 AI 生成媒体治理的讨论。此事凸显在主流应用市场上对 AI 驱动应用的治理难题和平台裁量的边界。

items.title_en: Academic fraud may be the symptom of a more systemic problem
items.title_zh: 学术不端可能只是更深层系统性问题的表象
items.summary_en: Vox Netherlands argues that academic fraud reflects funding pressures, evaluation culture, and systemic incentives. The piece calls for structural reforms and better incentives rather than focusing only on individual misconduct. It invites readers to rethink how research is funded, reviewed, and rewarded.
items.summary_zh: Vox Netherlands 认为学术不端揭示了资金压力、评价文化与体系性激励的问题，而不仅是个体行为。文章呼吁进行结构性改革、完善激励机制，而非只针对个体不端，同时促使人们重新思考研究经费、评审与奖励的方式。

items.title_en: Amazon to acquire Globalstar and expand Amazon Leo satellite network
items.title_zh: 亚马逊收购 Globalstar，扩展 Amazon Leo 卫星网络
items.summary_en: Amazon plans to acquire Globalstar to bolster its Leo satellite fleet, accelerating global connectivity ambitions for AWS and its satellite internet strategy. The deal could improve coverage, latency, and spectrum leverage for the Amazon Leo network.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊宣布收购 Globalstar，目的是增强其 Leo 卫星星座的覆盖与容量，加速 AWS 的全球连接计划。此次交易可能提升网络覆盖范围、延迟表现以及对光谱的协同利用。

items.title_en: Show HN: LangAlpha – what if Claude Code was built for Wall Street?
items.title_zh: LangAlpha：如果 Claude Code 面向华尔街打造
items.summary_en: LangAlpha demonstrates a version of Claude Code tuned for Wall Street workloads, with prompts and routines tailored to finance tasks like data extraction, risk analysis, and automated reporting. It showcases how domain-specific LLM tooling could be used in high-stakes environments.
items.summary_zh: LangAlpha 展示了面向华尔街工作负载的 Claude Code 版本，定制了用于数据提取、风险分析与自动化报告等金融任务的提示与流程。此举凸显了领域专用的 LLM 工具在高风险场景中的潜力。

items.title_en: Don't feel like exercising? Maybe it's the wrong time of day for you
items.title_zh: 不想运动？也许是你选择的时间不对
items.summary_en: A circadian-lights study suggests timing workouts matters for motivation and performance, implying people should exercise according to their chronotype. The piece encourages aligning training with your internal clock.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示锻炼时间与生物钟有关，按个人昼夜节律安排训练可提高动力与表现，建议根据 chronotype 调整锻炼计划。

items.title_en: Distributed DuckDB Instance
items.title_zh: 分布式 DuckDB 实例
items.summary_en: A distributed DuckDB instance aims to run analytical queries across multiple nodes, enabling larger-scale analytics than a single process. This direction tackles data distribution, parallel execution, and fault tolerance, signaling scalable analytics for analytics workloads.
items.summary_zh: 提出在多节点上运行 DuckDB 的分布式实例，以并行化分析查询、突破单进程的容量限制。该方向需解决数据分布、并行执行和故障恢复等挑战，代表分析型工作负载的可扩展性探索。

items.title_en: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.title_zh: 面向下一代网络防御的可信访问
items.summary_en: A scalable framework for trusted access could redefine how defense teams collaborate and enforce policies across networks and cloud environments. It highlights hardware-backed identities, auditable access trails, and strong zero-trust foundations to reduce risk at scale.
items.summary_zh: 探讨可扩展的可信访问框架，可能重塑现代网络防御中的协作与策略执行。强调硬件背书的身份、可审计的访问轨迹，以及以零信任为核心的安全基石，以在大规模环境中降低风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: Plain – The full-stack Python framework designed for humans and agents
items.title_zh: Show HN: Plain——为人和代理人设计的全栈 Python 框架
items.summary_en: Plain is a full-stack Python framework designed for humans and AI agents building apps. It emphasizes developer ergonomics, offering end-to-end tooling, clear abstractions, and smooth integration with AI workflows to speed up common tasks.
items.summary_zh: Plain 是一个为人和 AI 代理人打造应用的全栈 Python 框架，强调开发者体验。它提供端到端工具、清晰的抽象以及与 AI 工作流的无缝整合，帮助加速常见任务的实现。

items.title_en: Let's talk space toilets
items.title_zh: 谈谈太空厕所
items.summary_en: An exploration of space toilets, examining the challenges of microgravity and waste management on spacecraft. The discussion covers how engineering constraints shape life-support systems and the daily realities of long-duration missions.
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨太空厕所的设计与挑战，聚焦微重力下的废物管理以及与之相关的工程约束。内容揭示长期任务中生命维持系统的日常现实及其对航天工程的影响。

items.title_en: Free, fast diagnostic tools for DNS, email authentication, and network security
items.title_zh: 免费、快速的 DNS、邮件认证与网络安全诊断工具
items.summary_en: A toolkit of fast, free diagnostics for DNS health, email authentication (DMARC/SPF/DKIM), and basic network security checks. Useful for operators to quickly gauge hygiene, spot misconfigurations, and triage security issues without enterprise tools.
items.summary_zh: 提供一套免费、快速的 DNS 健康诊断、邮件认证（DMARC/SPF/DKIM）与基础网络安全检查工具，帮助运维人员在无需企业级工具的情况下快速评估安全状况、发现配置问题并进行故障排查。

items.title_en: What Claude Code's Source Revealed About AI Engineering Culture
items.title_zh: Claude Code 的源码揭示 AI 工程文化的内在面貌
items.summary_en: Analysis of Claude Code's public source hints at AI tool-building workflows, collaboration norms, and engineering practices. The piece offers a lens into how AI teams structure development, testing, and governance. It provides lessons for teams building with AI-assisted coding tools.
items.summary_zh: 对 Claude Code 公共源码的分析揭示了AI 工具构建工作流、协作规范与工程实践。文章从中揭示了AI 团队如何组织开发、测试与治理，为使用AI辅助编码工具的团队提供可借鉴的经验。

items.title_en: Multi-Agentic Software Development Is a Distributed Systems Problem
items.title_zh: 多代理软件开发本质是分布式系统问题
items.summary_en: Software development involving multiple agents (LLMs) is fundamentally a distributed systems challenge. It discusses coordination, consistency, and observability, proposing patterns like distributed logs and orchestration to enable scalable collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 提出多代理软件开发本质上是一个分布式系统问题，涉及协作、一致性、观测与调度等挑战。给出通过分布式日志、编排等模式来实现跨代理协作的思路。

items.title_en: GPT-5.4 Pro solves Erdős Problem #1196
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 Pro 解决 Erdős 问题 #1196
items.summary_en: GPT-5.4 Pro purportedly solves Erdős Problem #1196, illustrating AI's problem-solving potential. Treat this as a demonstration of capability while remaining skeptical without verification.
items.summary_zh: 声称 GPT-5.4 Pro 已解决 Erdős 问题 #1196，展示了 AI 在高难度数学题上的潜力与应用场景。对这类 claim 需保持可验证性与谨慎态度。

items.title_en: The Deepfake Nudes Crisis in Schools Is Worse Than You Thought
items.title_zh: 学校里的深伪裸照危机比你想象的还严重
items.summary_en: Wired reports that deepfake nude images in schools pose a systemic and escalating crisis. It underscores the urgent need for tech, policy, and education responses to deepfake threats.
items.summary_zh: Wired 报道称校园中的深伪裸照危机正持续升级，带来骚扰与隐私等严重问题。文章探讨了机构层面的防护措施与政策需求，强调在技术、政策与教育层面共同应对深伪威胁的重要性。

items.title_en: The Orange Pi 6 Plus
items.title_zh: Orange Pi 6 Plus
items.summary_en: The Orange Pi 6 Plus is a competitive entry in the evolving SBC market, offering a newer ARM CPU, improved I/O, and better multimedia support at a low price. The review weighs performance, software ecosystem, and trade-offs against rivals like Raspberry Pi.
items.summary_zh: Orange Pi 6 Plus 是在日益激烈的单板计算机市场中的有力竞争者，具备更新的 ARM CPU、改进的 I/O 和更好的多媒体支持，价格也更具吸引力。评测权衡了性能、软件生态和对比 Raspberry Pi 等对手时的取舍。

items.title_en: Costasiella kuroshimae – Solar Powered animals, that do indirect photosynthesis
items.title_zh: Costasiella kuroshimae——通过间接光合作用获取能量的动物
items.summary_en: Costasiella kuroshimae, a tiny sea slug, can perform indirect photosynthesis by keeping chloroplasts from the algae it eats. That unique kleptoplasty inspires bioenergy and synthetic biology ideas, showing how nature overlaps with energy harvesting.
items.summary_zh: Costasiella kuroshimae是一种微小海蛇，被动地通过从所吃藻类中偷取叶绿体来执行间接光合作用。这一独特的克制光合作用现象为生物能源与合成生物学提供灵感，展示了自然与能源 harvesting 的交叉。文章突显了自然世界作为工程灵感来源的显著案例。

items.title_en: The Death of an AI Whistleblower
items.title_zh: AI 吹哨人之死
items.summary_en: The Death of an AI Whistleblower examines the risks facing dissenters in the AI industry and debates around transparency and accountability. It spotlights the challenges of whistleblowing in fast-moving tech sectors.
items.summary_zh: 报道讨论 AI 行业中某位 whistleblower 的死亡，揭示对异议声音的风险与对透明度、问责制的关注。强调需要更强的透明性与保障机制。

items.title_en: A communist Apple II and fourteen years of not knowing what you're testing
items.title_zh: 一个共产主义 Apple II 与十四年不清楚自己在测试什么
items.summary_en: An oddball meditation on testing practice using a 'communist' Apple II and fourteen years of ambiguity about what is being tested. It surfaces how unclear testing goals spawn unchecked assumptions and free-riding behavior, and it calls for explicit test objectives and provenance in experiments.
items.summary_zh: 以一台“共产主义风格”的 Apple II 与十四年未澄清测试对象的经历为切入点，反映测试目标模糊如何滋生推诿和盲目测试。强调在实验中需要明确的目标、覆盖范围与可追溯性，倡导更清晰的测试边界与记录。

items.title_en: Picasso’s Guernica (Gigapixel)
items.title_zh: 毕加索《格尔尼卡》千亿像素（Gigapixel）
items.summary_en: A gigapixel viewer of Picasso's Guernica lets you zoom into brushwork, color, and composition at unprecedented detail. The exhibit blends art history with modern imaging tech to reveal new sensory dimensions.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个千亿像素的互动放大查看器，让人可以近距离观察毕加索《格尔尼卡》的笔触、调色和构图，融合艺术与现代成像技术。

items.title_en: My adventure in designing API keys
items.title_zh: 设计 API 密钥的历程
items.summary_en: Designing API keys involves balancing security, usability, and governance. The author's experiences cover scoping, rotation, revocation, and abuse prevention—lessons useful for anyone building APIs.
items.summary_zh: 分享在设计 API 密钥过程中的权衡与风险，涵盖作用域、轮换与撤销等方面的考量，以及如何防止滥用。为构建 API 的开发者提供可操作的经验教训。

items.title_en: Your codebase doesn't care how it got written
items.title_zh: 你的代码库并不在乎写作方式
items.summary_en: Your codebase doesn't care how it got written
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章强调代码库不会关心代码是如何编写的，重在可维护性、可读性与架构设计。作者建议通过重构和统一的工程实践来提高长期可维护性。

items.title_en: Scientists discover why bread can cause weight gain without extra calories
items.title_zh: 科学家发现面包为何在不增加额外热量时也会致胖
items.summary_en: Scientists discover why bread may contribute to weight gain beyond its calories due to metabolic effects like insulin response and satiety cues. The finding adds nuance to diet planning.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明面包通过影响饱腹感、胰岛素反应或肠道微生物等机制，在热量不增的情况下也可能促使体重增加，为饮食与代谢的复杂关系提供证据。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pseudonymizing sensitive data for LLMs without losing context
items.title_zh: Show HN：在不丢失上下文的情况下对 LLM 进行伪匿名化敏感数据
items.summary_en: A Show HN post discusses methods to pseudonymize sensitive data for LLMs without losing contextual usefulness. Techniques include token proxies or synthetic data pipelines to preserve signal while protecting privacy. The development points to practical privacy-preserving workflows for enterprise AI.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 文章探讨在不损失上下文信息的情况下，对 LLM 使用的敏感数据进行伪匿名化的方法。技术要点包括使用代币代理或合成数据管道来在保护隐私的同时保留信号。这类方法为企业 AI 提供了切实可行的隐私保护工作流。

items.title_en: The M×N problem of tool calling and open-source models
items.title_zh: 工具调用与开源模型的 M×N 问题
items.summary_en: Coordination of multiple tools with open-source models creates a combinatorial M×N problem, leading to maintenance, compatibility, and reliability challenges. The post offers patterns and practices for designing tool interfaces, versioning, and governance to tame the complexity.
items.summary_zh: 在 AI 代理中并用多种工具与开源模型时，会产生一个 M×N 的组合性问题，带来维护、兼容性与可靠性挑战。文中提出设计工具接口、版本控制与治理的模式和实践。

items.title_en: Guide.world: A compendium of travel guides
items.title_zh: guide.world：旅行指南大全
items.summary_en: guide.world curates a global compendium of travel guides, aggregating diverse sources into a single searchable hub. The project lowers friction for planning trips across destinations and languages, potentially challenging traditional guidebooks and travel sites.
items.summary_zh: guide.world 汇聚全球旅行指南，整合多源信息为一个可检索的中心。该项目降低了跨目的地与多语言规划的门槛，或将对传统指南书和旅行平台构成挑战。

items.title_en: Understanding Clojure's Persistent Vectors, pt. 1 (2013)
items.title_zh: 理解 Clojure 的持久向量，第一部分（2013）
items.summary_en: A primer on Clojure's immutable vectors, describing how a 32-ary tree with structural sharing underpins efficient updates and appends. It lays the groundwork for understanding performance characteristics of persistent vectors in functional programming.
items.summary_zh: 阐释 Clojure 如何用结构共享的32叉树实现不可变向量，讲解更新、追加等操作的高效性。为理解函数式编程中持久向量的性能特性打下基础。

items.title_en: Troubleshooting Email Delivery to Microsoft Users
items.title_zh: 向 Microsoft 用户投递邮件的故障排除
items.summary_en: The guide walks through common reasons emails fail to reach Microsoft domains and how to fix them, including DNS authentication (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), TLS, and reputation issues. It provides practical steps to improve deliverability and inbox placement for MS-based recipients.
items.summary_zh: 文章列出向 Microsoft 域投递邮件时常见的问题与解决方法，重点包括 DNS 认证（SPF、DKIM、DMARC）、传输层安全性和声誉管理。提供实用步骤以提升投递成功率与收件箱命中率。

items.title_en: MIT Radiation Laboratory
items.title_zh: MIT 放射实验室
items.summary_en: MIT's Radiation Laboratory led critical radar development in WWII and accelerated later tech advances. The history shows how military research ecosystems seeded civilian innovations. It sheds light on the interplay of science, defense, and entrepreneurship.
items.summary_zh: MIT 的放射实验室在二战期间推动了关键的雷达技术发展，并在后续科技进步中发挥了重要作用。该历史揭示了军事研究生态系统如何催生民用创新，并展示了科学、国防与创业之间的互动。

items.title_en: Pretty Fish: A better mermaid diagram editor
items.title_zh: Pretty Fish：更好的 Mermaid 图表编辑器
items.summary_en: Pretty Fish offers a more polished Mermaid diagram editor with a focus on usability. It aims to improve the flow and readability of diagrams used in documentation and planning. For developers who rely on diagramming, it presents a practical upgrade to a familiar tool.
items.summary_zh: Pretty Fish 提供了一个更为精致的 Mermaid 图表编辑器，专注于易用性。它旨在提升文档与规划中图表的可读性与流程性，为依赖图表的开发者带来实用升级。

items.title_en: Metro stop is Ancient Rome's new attraction
items.title_zh: 地铁站成了古罗马的新景点
items.summary_en: A Rome metro stop doubles as an archaeological site, revealing an ancient Roman era artifact. The ancient remains become a new attraction for travelers, integrating heritage with modern transit. It highlights how urban infrastructure projects can unlock surprising historical gems.
items.summary_zh: 罗马某地铁站兼具考古遗址属性，发掘出古罗马时期的遗存。此遗址成为游客新景点，将历史遗产与现代交通融合在一起，显示出城市基础设施工程也能挖掘出意想不到的历史宝藏。

items.title_en: Nucleus Nouns
items.title_zh: 核心名词
items.summary_en: Introduces nucleus nouns as the central anchors that carry most meaning in language or prompts, with modifiers adding nuance. The piece argues that focusing on nucleus nouns improves clarity, memory, and efficiency when communicating with AI.
items.summary_zh: 提出“核心名词”的概念，指在语言或提示中承载大部分含义的核心名词，其它修饰语用于增加细微语义。强调围绕核心名词构造表达有助于提升与 AI 交互时的清晰度、记忆性与效率。

items.title_en: Installing OpenBSD on the Pomera DM250 Writerdeck
items.title_zh: 在 Pomera DM250 上安装 OpenBSD
items.summary_en: A user documents porting and installing OpenBSD on the Pomera DM250 writer deck, detailing hardware compatibility, boot process, and potential use cases as a portable UNIX shell device.
items.summary_zh: 博主分享在 Pomera DM250 笔记本式设备上移植并安装 OpenBSD 的过程，讨论硬件兼容性、启动流程以及作为便携 UNIX 终端的潜在应用场景。

items.title_en: Carol's Causal Conundrum: a zine intro to causally ordered message delivery
items.title_zh: Carol 的因果难题：因果排序消息传递的 zine 入门
items.summary_en: A zine introducing causally ordered message delivery, explaining why event sequencing matters in distributed systems. The guide offers accessible explanations and visuals, plus practical notes on how causal ordering affects consistency, replication, and fault tolerance.
items.summary_zh: 一本入门 Zine 介绍因果有序消息传递，解释在分布式系统中事件排序为何重要。该指南提供易懂的解释与图解，并就因果顺序对一致性、复制与容错的影响给出实用要点。

items.title_en: How do Wake-On-LAN works
items.title_zh: Wake-On-LAN 如何工作
items.summary_en: Wake-On-LAN explained: how magic packets wake a powered-off machine over a local network, with security caveats and practical tips.
items.summary_zh: 解读 Wake-On-LAN 的工作原理：通过局域网发送魔术包唤醒处于关闭状态的设备，同时给出安全注意事项与实用建议。

items.title_en: We ran Doom on a 40 year old printer controller (Agfa Compugraphic 9000PS) [video]
items.title_zh: We ran Doom on a 40 year old printer controller
items.summary_en: A maker demonstrates running Doom on an Agfa Compugraphic 9000PS printer controller from the 1980s. The video showcases the ingenuity and limits of retro hardware, as well as software portability across unlikely platforms. It's a reminder of how far embedded systems have come and what hobbyists can push today.
items.summary_zh: 一位爱好者在一台1960年代/40年前的 Agfa Compugraphic 9000PS 打印机控制器上跑出《Doom》。视频展示了复古硬件的极限与巧思以及跨平台移植的可能性，提醒我们嵌入式系统已走过的路以及爱好者如今能实现的极限。

items.title_en: Forcing an inversion of control on the SaaS stack
items.title_zh: 在 SaaS 堆栈上强制实施控制反转
items.summary_en: Critiques forcing inversion of control on the SaaS stack, especially client-side injections that blur boundaries and raise security concerns. The piece argues for cleaner architectures and safer extensibility.
items.summary_zh: 批评在 SaaS 堆栈强行引入控制反转，尤其是客户端注入带来的边界模糊与安全隐患。文章主张采用更清晰的架构与更安全的可扩展性。

items.title_en: Fix monitor that goes black, off or blinks due to static electricity in chair
items.title_zh: 因椅子静电导致显示器黑屏/闪烁的修复方法
items.summary_en: A practical guide to diagnosing and fixing monitors that go black, blink, or flicker due to static electricity from a chair. Solutions include grounding, anti-static measures, and cable management to eliminate the root cause.
items.summary_zh: 介绍因椅子静电导致显示器黑屏、闪烁的排查与修复方法。内容涵盖接地、防静电措施与走线优化，以根本解决静电问题。

items.title_en: What Is in Road Flares?
items.title_zh: 路障信号弹里到底装的是什么？
items.summary_en: Road flares contain chemical compounds and safety mechanisms; the article explains their composition and usage. Understanding their makeup reveals why they are effective but also hazardous and regulated. It connects everyday safety gear to chemistry and engineering considerations.
items.summary_zh: 路障信号弹包含化学成分与安全机制，文章解释了它们的组成与使用方法。了解其成分有助于理解为何信号弹有效但也具有危险性与监管要求，并将日常安全装备与化学工程联系起来进行解读。

items.title_en: PCBWay sponsorship: full-size SD module for Arduino projects
items.title_zh: PCBWay 赞助：为 Arduino 项目提供全尺寸 SD 模块
items.summary_en: PCBWay sponsors an Arduino-friendly full-size SD module, simplifying data logging and storage for hardware projects.
items.summary_zh: PCBWay 提供赞助，提供适用于 Arduino 项目的全尺寸 SD 模块，便于数据记录与存储扩展。文章还可能包含接线要点、引脚分配以及对业余硬件套件的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Founders Need to Be Ruthless When Chasing Deals
items.title_zh: 创始人在追逐交易时需要毫不留情
items.summary_en: A Steve Blank piece argues founders should ruthlessly pursue deals to avoid wasting cycles on bad terms. It emphasizes disciplined decision-making, clear deal criteria, and the willingness to walk away.
items.summary_zh: Steve Blank 的文章主张创始人在追逐交易时应果断无比，以避免在不利条款上浪费时间。核心在于设定清晰的交易标准并敢于在不合适时说不。

items.title_en: Game: Print Gallery Of An Artist, A brief exploration of recursive spaces
items.title_zh: 艺术家画廊的 Print Gallery：递归空间的简短探索
items.summary_en: Print Gallery Of An Artist is a game exploring recursive spaces and self-reference through an artful, text-driven experience. It offers a compact meditation on recursion within a playful gallery metaphor.
items.summary_zh: 这款游戏以印刷风格的艺术家画廊为主题，探索递归空间与自指元素，通过艺术化的体感或流程生成呈现。提供对递归概念的简短但直观的体验。

items.title_en: Show HN: GNU Grep as a PHP Extension
items.title_zh: Show HN：将 GNU grep 做成 PHP 扩展
items.summary_en: Show HN: GNU grep as a PHP extension demonstrates bringing classic Unix tools into modern runtimes, potentially speeding up searches inside PHP apps.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示把 GNU grep 做成 PHP 扩展，可能让在 PHP 应用中直接进行快速搜索成为现实。这体现了将经典 Unix 工具融入现代运行时的持续尝试。

items.title_en: New Modern Greek
items.title_zh: New Modern Greek
items.summary_en: New Modern Greek discusses language modernization—updates to orthography or lexicon that affect NLP tooling and localization.
items.summary_zh: New Modern Greek 涉及希腊语的现代化更新，可能涉及正字法或词汇变革，对 NLP 工具和本地化有影响。
